description:
Inflexa is a semi-autonomous scientific analysis agent for multi-omics, cheminformatics, and imaging data.

Research teams generate far more data than they can analyze. The routine parts run themselves, but the work that actually drives decisions depends on overbooked bioinformaticians who only test the hypotheses the researcher already had in mind. Most signals never get looked at.

Inflexa reads the relevant literature, proposes testable hypotheses grounded in both published work and patterns in the data, runs multiple analytical methods per step, and compares results. Researchers stay in control at every checkpoint, approving, modifying, or asking questions along the way.

Every result links back to the input data, the code version, and the method that produced it. Reports come with publication-ready figures, reproducible code, and complete audit trails.

Built for regulated science. SOC 2, HIPAA, 21 CFR Part 11, bring-your-own-cloud deployment.
name: Inflexa
